description_long: This is a stylized, low-poly representation of a toucan, characterized by its large, prominent orange beak that curves slightly downward and ends in a black tip. The bird's body is predominantly black, with a white patch on its throat and upper chest, and a subtle grayish area on the lower face. Its legs and feet are gray and splayed, supporting the bird in a standing posture. The tail is broad and flat, extending straight back from the body. The overall form is geometric, with faceted surfaces and simplified shapes, giving it a modern, abstract appearance suitable for urban decorative or educational contexts.
description: A low-poly toucan with a large orange beak, black body, white throat, and gray legs, rendered in a geometric, faceted style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the orange beak, black body, white throat patch, and flat tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical beak, white throat, and splayed gray feet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the beak and body features, with the tail and legs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad, flat tail and the back of the head and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid black body with a white throat patch and orange beak
